prompt: A dramatic vertical high-fashion sports campaign photo of a young Black male forward in a white Real Madrid home kit performing a knee-slide celebration on the grass near the sideline inside a packed football stadium at night. His face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur, while the body remains sharply lit and photorealistic. The stadium is massive and full, with thousands of cheering fans dressed mostly in white, 4 visible large supporter flags waving in the background, stewards in neon yellow jackets along the pitch edge, and bright floodlights flaring in the top left corner. Include pitch-side advertising boards with football branding and a dark blue board showing the word RESPECT, plus a curved stadium ribbon displaying repeated celebratory text. Add a huge elegant white serif headline across the upper center reading Hala Madrid., and a small white Pollo.ai logo in the top right corner. Shot from a low wide-angle perspective for a heroic, triumphant feel, with cinematic contrast, crisp jersey texture, realistic grass detail, shallow background softness, luxury editorial sportswear ad aesthetic, ultra-realistic photography.
